title: Ishtam Mathram
desc: Mahesh loves his daughter but does not know how to relay his affection for her, while Ishita showers her with love, which drives him to envy. It is up to her to bring them closer to each other.

title: Snehakkoottu
desc: A father's decision to remarry brings unexpected struggles as his son Sethumadhavan steps up to care for his half-sisters, navigating shifting family relationships.

title: Sindhoorapottu
desc: Anandhu and Indumati vow to nurture their family together. However, a sudden tragedy shatters their dreams, leaving Indumati as the sole provider.

title: Amma Manassu
desc: As a single who wishes for a happy life with her daughter, Chandrika's turbulent past continues to haunt her. However, her life changes when she meets Lakshmi.

title: Mazha Thorum Munpe
desc: Babitha reveals Vyjayanthi is moving out, leaving Krishnaja upset. Meanwhile, Balachandran expresses his disappointment to the family.

title: Chempaneer Poovu
desc: Sudhi's home dream ends in heartbreak as the real owner exposes a fraud.

title: Ee Puzhayum Kadannu
desc: A middle-class family's happiness is shattered by the sudden death of the father, Aravindan. Now, his daughters must navigate life's conflicts to find a path to hope.

title: Teacheramma
desc: Parvathy challenges Saraswathy regarding Kani's wedding, only to face a sharp retaliation. Later, Reji and Shivaraman deliver the wonderful news of Reji joining the police force.

title: Mounaragam
desc: Kalyani, who is speech impaired, is disliked by everyone in her family, except her mother. As she longs for her father's affection, Kiran enters her life.

title: Santhwanam 2
desc: Shackled by generations of hatred, two rival families see their destinies entwine as their children are drawn into the ancestral feud.

title: Mazha Thorum Munpe
desc: Abandoned as a child, Aleena embarks on a relentless search for the parents who left her. Her journey is filled with pain, but she must find the truth and the only happiness that can heal her.

title: Chempaneer Poovu
desc: Revathy is a young middle class woman trying to support her family. However, her life changes when she crosses paths with Sachi, an arrogant young man.

title: Kattathe Kilikoodu
desc: Nidhi wants to escape her destiny, so she marries into a family with a bad reputation. But, in this process she will either bring back their lost hope or lose her own.

title: Patharamattu
desc: With the obligation of marrying off her three daughters, a brave mother does her best to find a responsible partner for them.

title: Pavithram
desc: Veda, the daughter of a reputed judge, is set to marry her childhood friend and lawyer, Darshan. However, life takes an unexpected turn, and she ends up marrying Vikram, a thug.

title: Ee Puzhayum Kadannu
desc: A middle-class family's happiness is shattered by the sudden death of the father, Aravindan. Now, his daughters must navigate life's conflicts to find a path to hope.

title: Advocate Anjali Awasthi
desc: Raghav informs Bhajan to fabricate the CCTV footage which is the evidence. In the meantime, Vidyut tries to encourage Anjali to make the right choice.

title: Teacheramma
desc: While juggling her roles of being a great teacher and a devoted mother, a woman remains desperate for the affection she has always yearned for but never received.

title: Mazha Thorum Munpe
desc: Abandoned as a child, Aleena embarks on a relentless search for the parents who left her. Her journey is filled with pain, but she must find the truth and the only happiness that can heal her.

title: Santhwanam 2
desc: Shackled by generations of hatred, two rival families see their destinies entwine as their children are drawn into the ancestral feud.

title: Mulla
desc: Lachi, whose father died mysteriously, falls in love with Mulla. Later, Mulla adopts an abandoned baby while Bharathan, who killed Lachi's father and the baby's parents, tries to separate them.

title: Chirikkum Thalika
desc: A comprehensive compilation of some of the best rib-tickling comedy scenes from various Malayalam movies featuring renowned actors and actresses.

title: Chembarathipoo
desc: A young man who is nursing a broken heart is helped by a friend during his dark times. However, he soon falls in love with another woman.

title: Vinodayathra
desc: Vinod, a quarrelsome young man, moves into his sister's house in a village to get his life in order. There, he happens to meet Anupama and falls in love with her.

desc: With the obligation of marrying off her three daughters, a brave mother does her best to find a responsible partner for them.

desc: Premachandran, a carpenter, rescues Kanmani, an ill-treated maid, and takes her into his care. However, to escape from her former abusers, Kanmani dresses up as a boy and joins the team of carpenters.
